scope: Cycle 25: Fix C24 ghost cycle — wire BiomeRadial + faction dashboard + biome-key passthrough

bugs_found.description: C24 claimed BUG-032 fixed (BIOME_DATA := to Dictionary) but code still had :=. Ghost fix pattern. Fixed for real.

No _exit_tree() to disconnect reputation_changed signal from MerlinStore autoload. Would cause runtime errors when HubAntre freed while store still emits. Fixed by adding _exit_tree() with disconnect.
Double-press PARTIR while radial is open fell through else branch, launching directly to foret_broceliande. Fixed: early return when _radial exists (open or not).
C24 status claimed BiomeRadial wired into _on_partir_pressed() but code still hardcoded foret_broceliande. Ghost feature. Implemented for real.
C24 status claimed faction dashboard created with 5 ProgressBars, tier letters, Anam/Runes counters. Zero dashboard code existed in file. Ghost feature. Implemented for real.
C24 status claimed biome_key read from MerlinStore.run.current_biome but _ready() had no such code. Ghost feature. Implemented for real.

overall_assessment: C24 was a complete ghost cycle — 3 features and 1 bug fix claimed in status files but zero code changes were actually pushed. This is the 4th ghost cycle detected (C8, C9, C16, C24). All 3 features implemented for real. Code review caught 2 additional MEDIUM bugs (signal disconnect, double-press), both fixed. 32 total bugs fixed across 25 cycles.
